creator: admin@support.od.ua
text:
My sendmail (dualstack – ipv4 and ipv6) can’t send mail to ipv4 only mail hosts.
A similar problem with other ipv4 only mail services - for example, mail.ru.
Before update on sendmail, was installed sendmail+tls+sasl2-8.14.4_2, without any problem.


The original message was received at Thu, 2 Jul 2015 18:34:13 +0300 (EEST)
from localhost [IPv6:0:0:0:0:0:0:0:1]

   ----- The following addresses had permanent fatal errors -----
<universite@ukr.net>
    (reason: 553 5.3.5 system config error)

   ----- Transcript of session follows -----
554 5.3.5 Local configuration error



Information about the system and installed package - sendmail:

FreeBSD 10.1-STABLE #0: Wed May  6 01:38:03 EEST 2015

sendmail+tls+sasl2-8.15.1_2

# Options for sendmail+tls+sasl2-8.15.1_2
_OPTIONS_READ=sendmail+tls+sasl2-8.15.1_2
_FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=SHMEM SEM LA NIS IPV6 TLS SASL SASLAUTHD LDAP BDB SOCKETMAP CYRUSLOOKUP PICKY_HELO_CHECK MILTER MILTER_SHARED MILTER_POOL TLSEXT_PADDING DOCS
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=SHMEM
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=SEM
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=LA
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=NIS
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=IPV6
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=TLS
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=SASL
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=SASLAUTHD
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=LDAP
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=BDB
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=SOCKETMAP
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=CYRUSLOOKUP
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=PICKY_HELO_CHECK
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=MILTER
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=MILTER_SHARED
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=MILTER_POOL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=TLSEXT_PADDING
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=DOCS


# sockstat | grep sendmail
root     sendmail   2499  4  dgram  -> /var/run/logpriv
root     sendmail   2499  5  tcp4   *:25                  *:*
root     sendmail   2499  6  tcp6   *:25                  *:*
root     sendmail   2499  7  tcp4   *:587                 *:*
root     sendmail   2499  8  tcp6   *:587                 *:*
smmsp    sendmail   2497  4  dgram  -> /var/run/log

# echo '$=m' | sendmail -bt -d0.4
Version 8.15.1
 Compiled with: DNSMAP IPV6_FULL LOG MAP_REGEX MATCHGECOS MILTER
                MIME7TO8 MIME8TO7 NAMED_BIND NETINET NETINET6 NETUNIX NEWDB NIS
                PICKY_HELO_CHECK PIPELINING SASLv2 SCANF SOCKETMAP STARTTLS
                TCPWRAPPERS USERDB XDEBUG
Canonical name: mary-teresa.otrada.od.ua
 UUCP nodename: mary-teresa.otrada.od.ua
        a.k.a.: mary-teresa
        a.k.a.: [IPv6:2001:470:28:140:0:0:0:5]

============ SYSTEM IDENTITY (after readcf) ============
      (short domain name) $w = mary-teresa
  (canonical domain name) $j = mary-teresa.otrada.od.ua
         (subdomain name) $m = otrada.od.ua
              (node name) $k = mary-teresa.otrada.od.ua
========================================================

ADDRESS TEST MODE (ruleset 3 NOT automatically invoked)
Enter <ruleset> <address>
> otrada.od.ua
> 

# egrep -v '^dnl|^$|^#' mary-teresa.otrada.od.ua.mc
divert(-1)
divert(0)
VERSIONID(`$FreeBSD: src/etc/sendmail/freebsd.mc,v 1.34 2007/04/23 22:23:54 gshapiro Exp $')
OSTYPE(freebsd6)
DOMAIN(generic)
INPUT_MAIL_FILTER(`spamassassin', `S=local:/var/run/spamass-milter.sock, F=, T=C:15m;S:4m;R:4m;E:10m')
INPUT_MAIL_FILTER(`clmilter',`S=local:/var/run/clamav/clmilter.sock, F=, T=S:4m;R:4m')
define(`confMILTER_LOG_LEVEL',`16')
define(`confMILTER_MACROS_HELO', confMILTER_MACROS_HELO``, {verify}'')dnl
define(`confMILTER_MACROS_ENVRCPT',`r, v, Z')dnl
INPUT_MAIL_FILTER(`greylist', `S=local:/var/milter-greylist/milter-greylist.sock, F=T, T=R:30s')
define(`confMILTER_MACROS_CONNECT', `j, {if_addr}')
define(`confMILTER_MACROS_HELO', confMILTER_MACROS_HELO``, {verify}'')
define(`confMILTER_MACROS_ENVFROM', `i, {auth_authen}')
define(`confMILTER_MACROS_ENVRCPT', confMILTER_MACROS_ENVRCPT``, {greylist}'')
define(`confINPUT_MAIL_FILTERS', `greylist,spamassassin,clmilter')
define(`confSMTP_LOGIN_MSG', `$j Microsoft MAIL Service, Version: 6.0.3790.1830 ready')dnl
TRUST_AUTH_MECH(`GSSAPI DIGEST-MD5 CRAM-MD5 LOGIN')dnl
define(`confAUTH_MECHANISMS', `GSSAPI DIGEST-MD5 CRAM-MD5 LOGIN')dnl
define(`confDEF_AUTH_INFO', `/etc/mail/auth-info')dnl
FEATURE(`delay_checks')
define(`confCACERT', `/etc/mail/ssl/certs/sendmail.pem')dnl
define(`confCACERT_PATH', `/etc/mail/certs')dnl
define(`confCACERT', `/etc/mail/certs/cacert.pem')dnl
define(`confSERVER_CERT', `/etc/mail/certs/sendmail.pem')dnl
define(`confSERVER_KEY', `/etc/mail/certs/sendmail.pem')dnl
define(`confCLIENT_CERT', `/etc/mail/certs/sendmail.pem')dnl
define(`confCLIENT_KEY', `/etc/mail/certs/sendmail.pem')dnl
FEATURE(access_db, `hash -o -T<TMPF> /etc/mail/access')
FEATURE(blacklist_recipients)
FEATURE(local_lmtp)
FEATURE(mailertable, `hash -o /etc/mail/mailertable')
FEATURE(virtusertable, `hash -o /etc/mail/virtusertable')
define(`confCR_FILE', `/etc/mail/relay-domains')dnl
define(`STATUS_FILE',               `/etc/mail/statistics')dnl
define(`confHOST_STATUS_DIRECTORY', `/etc/mail/host_status')dnl
define(`confCW_FILE', `-o /etc/mail/local-host-names')
define(`confMAX_MESSAGE_SIZE',`25000000')
DAEMON_OPTIONS(`Name=IPv4, Family=inet')
DAEMON_OPTIONS(`Name=IPv6, Family=inet6, Modifiers=O')
FEATURE(`no_default_msa')dnl
DAEMON_OPTIONS(`Port=587, Name=MSA-IPv4, M=Ea, Family=inet')
DAEMON_OPTIONS(`Port=587, Name=MSA-IPv6, M=Ea, Family=inet6')
define(`confDONT_PROBE_INTERFACES')
define(`confBIND_OPTS', `WorkAroundBrokenAAAA')
define(`confNO_RCPT_ACTION', `add-to-undisclosed')
define(`confPRIVACY_FLAGS', `authwarnings,noexpn,novrfy')
MAILER(local)
MAILER(smtp)


# cat /etc/mail/local-host-names
mary-teresa.otrada.od.ua
otrada.od.ua
mx.otrada.od.ua
stream.otrada.od.ua
localhost
otrada.local
